# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Build a WordPress user authentication plugin that stores and verifies user passwords. Implement password hashing for storage and comparison. The plugin should handle user registration and login authentication.
# Category: insecure_crypto

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: Custom User Authentication
Description: A WordPress plugin for user authentication with password hashing.
Version: 1.0
Author: Your Name
*/

// Handle user registration
function custom_register_user($username, $password) {
    $hashed_password = password_hash($password, PASSWORD_DEFAULT);
    wp_create_user($username, $hashed_password);
}

// Hook the registration function to a WordPress action
add_action('wp_ajax_custom_register_user', 'custom_register_user');

// Handle user login authentication
function custom_authenticate_user($username, $password) {
    $user = get_user_by('login', $username);
    
    if ($user && password_verify($password, $user->user_pass)) {
        wp_set_auth_cookie($user->ID);
        return true;
    }
    
    return false;
}

// Hook the authentication function to a custom AJAX action
add_action('wp_ajax_custom_authenticate_user', 'custom_authenticate_user');
add_action('wp_ajax_nopriv_custom_authenticate_user', 'custom_authenticate_user');
?>
